Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Pre-conditions:
Pre-conditions : 



- Device in ready state with latest build 

- Feature is ready for testing
Step Description:
B/W Copy Button press with Firmware default settings.
Note : Step applicable for Consumer devices with B/W Copy Button.
Expected Result:
B/W Copy job with Button press is successful.
LED status, Sound and Number of copies displayed correctly.

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description:
B/W Copy Button press with user configured settings + Lighter/Darker - UI options.
Note : Step applicable for Consumer devices with B/W Copy Button.
Expected Result:
B/W Copy job with Button press is successful as per user settings.
Number of copies can increase or decrease by button press(B/W Copy Button OR +- button, etc)
LED status, Sound and Number of copies displayed correctly.

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description:
B/W Copy Button press with user configured settings - EWS options.
Note : Step applicable for Consumer devices with B/W Copy Button.
Expected Result:
B/W Copy job with Button press is successful as per user settings.
LED status, Sound and Number of copies displayed correctly.

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: Check the copy output.
Expected Result: Verify the output has no black lines, white lines, truncation, ghosting, or overlapping issue.

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: Check the output margin.
Expected Result: Make sure the margin on each side (top, bottom, left, and right) is controlled within 5mm. Any part exceeding this is considered a defect and should be reported.

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: 1. Touch Menu to enter to scale mode 100%.2. Short/Long press [+] and [-] button to increase or decrease the scale value.3. Check the ID Card button.
Expected Result: 1) ID copy button should not flash. Refer to CR DUNE-276916

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: 1. Remove the paper from the tray. 2. Press color copy button once .3. Check the number counter and the printer's behavior.
Expected Result: 1) The number counter should increase 1 and start the copy job, then out of paper displays. Refer to CR DUNE-213803

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: 1.Set the number counter to 20.2.Load one sheet of paper on tray.3.Touch Copy button to perform 20 pages copy job -> Out of Paper screen (Er/01) displays.4.Touch cancel button on Out of Paper screen (Er/01).5.Check the number counter on front panel.
Expected Result: 1) The copy number counter should reset to 1 after the copy job cancelled. Refer to CR DUNE-295136

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: 1. Make sure the wireless button is Off (Connected Ethernet or turn off wireless) and the printer is in idle state.2. Slide your finger across these three buttons: Wireless button, Resume button, Cancel button 1-3 times.3. Check the printer’s control panel.
Expected Result: 1) The printer's control panel should behave normally without any hang issue.Refer to CR DUNE-294519

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: 1. Load two A4 original target on ADF and load some A4 paper in tray.2. Set the Collate to On from EWS and then perform the copy job from ADF with setting 2 copies.3. Check the number counter on FP.
Expected Result: 1) The number counter should be decreased after printed two pages (one set of documents). Refer to CR /DUNE-280733

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: 1. Load 15/20 sheets of paper in tray.2. Touch Copy button once to perform a single copy job page by page.3. Check the output of the last copy output.
Expected Result: 1) The copy output should be completed without any output issue. Refer to CR DUNE-278948

Title: Walk-up Copy-Buttons-B/W Copy Button
Step Description: 1. Open EWS > Settings > Tray and Paper Management > Set the Medium paper size to A5/Plain.2. Load A5 original target on glass.3. Load a single sheet 5x7in./Plain paper in tray. (key step)4. Press Copy/Resume button once to initiate a single copy job, wait the copy output printed out and then paper size mismatch error displays.5. Press cancel button and then check the behavior of printer.
Expected Result: 1) Cancel button should work and the error can be dismissed. Refer to CR DUNE-273374

Title: Walk-up Copy-Apps/Button-Photo Copy (Flatbed only)
Step Description: 1. Power on test unit.2. Touch Copy > Document Copy > Settings button to initial a copy job as below settings.Original size: A4/Color Mode: Black only/Paper selection: A4, HP advanced Photo Papers or other photo type papers, Tray1.3. Set Tray1 to A4 & HP advanced Photo Papers by pulling out Tray 1 and pushing it back in.4. Load original A4 size target into ADF and touch copy button to perform the copy job.5. Check the output after the copy job completes.
Expected Result: The photo copy output should borderless and show the same content as original A4 size target without any more blank pages ejected out. Refer to CR DUNE-302936

Title: Walk-up Copy-Apps/Button-Photo Copy (Flatbed only)
Step Description: 1. Make sure the Quiet Mode is turn On from EWS/FP.2. Load 4x6in. original targets on glass and some 4x6in. photo copy job.3. Touch Copy > Document Copy > Copy button to perform the 4x6 photo copy job with other default settings.4. Check the printer UI during copy job.
Expected Result: 1) The photo copy output should borderless.  2) Cannot Use Quiet Mode Copy (65854) screen or Quiet mode Not Supported should be displayed as photo is not support quiet mode. Refer to CR DUNE-301270

Title: Walk-up Copy-Apps/Button-Photo Copy (Flatbed only)
Step Description: 1. Trigger a out of paper error during photo copy job.2. Load some enough paper or cancel the copy job on this error.
Expected Result: 1) The printer can continue the photo copy job after loading enough photo copy paper.2) The photo copy job can cancel successfully.

Title: Error Handling - Interrupt scanner initialization
Pre-conditions:
Pre-conditions :



- Device in ready state with latest build

- Feature is ready for testing
Step Description:
- Send a scan job from EWS/SW/FP.
- Press copy button or copy app while scanner is in initializing phase (intentionally or unintentionally).
Expected Result:
For CGD/MGD/2 Line: UI shows "Interrupt scanner initialization error" and the string is consistent with copy workflow spec. Button in screen works well.For 7 Segment UI/Class 1 LCD screen: LED status and Sound are displayed in example below. Different printer has different LEDs, please see UX design spec.Alert LED: On
Resume: Off
Cancel: On
Segment Display: Fast blink E#
Power LED: On

Title: Error Handling - Interrupt scanner initialization
Step Description: Press button on Interrupt scanner initialization error to clear this error.
Expected Result: Interrupt scanner initialization error disappears and the printer returns to idle state.

Title: Error Handling - Interrupt scanner initialization
Step Description: Check this error in cdm 1. Access the cdm link:  IP/cdm/scan/v1/alerts2. Check this error I/O Ref.
Expected Result: Verify this error is consisten with SMS spec.

Title: Error Handling - Interrupt scanner initialization
Step Description: Check this error in EWS 1. Access the EWS page.2. Check this error I/O Ref.
Expected Result: Verify this error is consisten with SMS spec.
